mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POST(MEMBER_ID, PlACE_ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, POST_RATING, POST_IMG) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{placeId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{postRating}, #{postImg})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST p
WHERE p.POST_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.POST_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT p.POST_ID, p.MEMBER_ID, p.POST_TITLE, p.POST_CONTENT, p.POST_IMG, p.POST_RATING, p.POST_CREATED_AT, p.POST_UPDATED_AT, m.MEMBER_NAME, pl.PLACE_NAME, pl.PLACE_ADDRESS, pl.PLACE_LAT, pl.PLACE_LNG FROM POST p JOIN MEMBER m ON p.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE pl on p.PLACE_ID = pl.PLACE_ID WHERE p.POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE POST SET POST_TITLE = #{postTitle}, POST_CONTENT = #{postContent}, POST_RATING = #{postRating},
PLACE_ID = #{placeId},
POST_IMG = #{postImg},
POST_UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.POST_ID, p.POST_TITLE, p.POST_IMG, p.POST_RATING, p.POST_CREATED_AT, m.MEMBER_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM POST_LIKE lk WHERE lk.POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c WHERE c.POST_ID = p.POST_ID) AS COMMENT_COUNT FROM POST p JOIN MEMBER m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY p.POST_ID DESC
SELECT p.POST_ID, p.POST_TITLE, p.POST_RATING, p.POST_IMG, pl.PLACE_NAME, pl.PLACE_LAT, pl.PLACE_LNG FROM POST p JOIN PLACE pl ON p.PLACE_ID = pl.PLACE_ID ORDER BY p.POST_ID DESC
